Tongyi Qianwen vs Zhipu CogView

Tongyi Qianwen

Alibaba's model family, from lightweight 0.5B to flagship 235B. Qwen3 series is the all-rounder among open-source models. Free to use, cheap API. Supports multimodal (text, image, video, code).

Pros

  • ✓Generous new user credits
  • ✓Affordable API
  • ✓Alibaba ecosystem
  • ✓Strong multimodal

Cons

  • ✗Average creativity
  • ✗Reasoning not as good as DeepSeek

Key Features

Qwen3 full series open sourceMultimodal support (text/image/video/code)0.5B to 235B multiple sizes200K context windowTool calling capabilityAgent framework support
View Details →

Zhipu CogView

Zhipu AI's image generation model, available directly in ChatGLM. Free daily credits, strong Chinese prompt understanding.

Pros

  • ✓Best Chinese prompt understanding
  • ✓No separate registration
  • ✓Use directly in ChatGLM
  • ✓Free

Cons

  • ✗Quality below professional tools
  • ✗Relatively simple features
  • ✗Limited resolution

Key Features

Text to ImageDirect use in ChatGLMStrong Chinese understandingMultiple stylesFree to use
View Details →
